title: Himalayan Foothills Serenity
shortDescription: Spiritual awakening and nature trails in the Himalayan foothills.
overview: Experience the spiritual aura of the Ganges in Haridwar and Rishikesh, combined with the colonial charm of Mussoorie.
highlights: Ganga Aarti at Har ki Pauri

itinerary.title: Rishikesh Exploration
itinerary.description: Visit Laxman Jhula, Triveni Ghat, and optional rafting.

itinerary.title: Drive to Mussoorie
itinerary.description: Scenic drive to the Queen of Hills.

itinerary.title: Mussoorie Sightseeing
itinerary.description: Visit Kempty Falls and Gun Hill.
